title.en: China-to-Armenia Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入亚美尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入亞美尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Armenia SARM standards practice, EAEU TR CU / EAC conformity for in-scope low-voltage and EMC products, PSRC electricity-sector rules, ENA distribution-grid connection, IEC 62109 safety, IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 grid evidence, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, and 220/380 V 50 Hz grid expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与亚美尼亚SARM标准实践、适用低压及EMC产品的EAEU TR CU / EAC符合性、PSRC电力行业规则、ENA配电网接入、IEC 62109安全、IEC 62116 / IEC 61727并网证据、IEC 61000 EMC证据及220/380 V 50 Hz电网要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與亞美尼亞SARM標準實務、適用低壓及EMC產品的EAEU TR CU / EAC符合性、PSRC電力行業規則、ENA配電網接入、IEC 62109安全、IEC 62116 / IEC 61727併網證據、IEC 61000 EMC證據及220/380 V 50 Hz電網要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, EAEU TR CU scope determination, SARM standards interpretation, PSRC licensing or tariff decision, ENA grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, designers, and installers should verify current Armenia, EAEU, SARM, PSRC, ENA, HVEN, customs, tender, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, tender submission, installation, or commissioning.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、EAEU TR CU适用范围裁定、SARM标准解释、PSRC许可或电价决定、ENA并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商、设计方和安装方在出货、投标、安装或调试前应与合格专业人士核验现行亚美尼亚、EAEU、SARM、PSRC、ENA、HVEN、海关、招标及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、EAEU TR CU適用範圍裁定、SARM標準解釋、PSRC許可或電價決定、ENA併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商、設計方和安裝方在出貨、投標、安裝或調試前應與合格專業人士核驗現行亞美尼亞、EAEU、SARM、PSRC、ENA、HVEN、海關、招標及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Armenia, the baseline is different from non-EAEU CIS markets: Armenia is an EAEU member, so in-scope electrical and electronic products may require EAEU conformity assessment and EAC marking, commonly under TR CU 004/2011 low-voltage equipment and TR CU 020/2011 EMC. That EAEU route sits alongside Armenia-specific SARM standards practice and project-level PSRC / ENA grid-connection requirements. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 evidence can support technical review, but it does not automatically satisfy EAEU TR CU / EAC, SARM, IEC 62109 / 62116 / 61727, or ENA connection gates.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口亚美尼亚时，基线要求不同于非EAEU的独联体市场：亚美尼亚是EAEU成员，因此落入范围的电气和电子产品可能需要EAEU符合性评价及EAC标志，通常涉及TR CU 004/2011低压设备和TR CU 020/2011 EMC。该EAEU路径与亚美尼亚本国SARM标准实践及项目层面的PSRC / ENA并网要求并行适用。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024证据可用于技术审查，但不会自动满足EAEU TR CU / EAC、SARM、IEC 62109 / 62116 / 61727或ENA接入门槛。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口亞美尼亞時，基線要求不同於非EAEU的獨立國協市場：亞美尼亞是EAEU成員，因此落入範圍的電氣和電子產品可能需要EAEU符合性評價及EAC標誌，通常涉及TR CU 004/2011低壓設備和TR CU 020/2011 EMC。該EAEU路徑與亞美尼亞本國SARM標準實務及項目層面的PSRC / ENA併網要求並行適用。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024證據可用於技術審查，但不會自動滿足EAEU TR CU / EAC、SARM、IEC 62109 / 62116 / 61727或ENA接入門檻。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
